title: Select strategies for adding within 100
description: Practice telling which strategies work for adding two numbers within 100.
topic_path: Get ready for addition and subtraction

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $48+35$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

**The following strategies can be used to add $48+35$.**

- Add $40+30$ then add $8$ then add $5$.

- Add $48$ and $2$ then add $33$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $78+9$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $77+10$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{78}+\purpleD{9}=&(\blueE{77}+\blueE{1})+\purpleD{9} \\\\
=&\blueE{77}+(\blueE{1}+\purpleD{9}) \\\\
=&\blueE{77}+10 
\end{align}$

**Yes**, this strategy works.

**The following strategy can be used to add $78+9$.**

- Add $77+10$.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

**The following strategies can be used to add $14+83$.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $73+28$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $75+30$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{73}+\purpleD{28}&=\blueE{73}+\purpleD{2}+\purpleD{26}\\\\
&=75+\purpleD{26}\\\\
&\ne75+\redE{30}
\end{align}$

**No**, this strategy does **not** work.

**The following strategy can be used to add $73+28$.**

- Add $73+20$ then add $8$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $46+46$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $6+6$ then add $80$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{46}+\purpleD{46}=&\blueE{40}+\blueE{6}+\purpleD{40}+\purpleD{6} \\\\
=&\blueE{6}+\purpleD{6}+\blueE{40}+\purpleD{40} \\\\
=&\blueE{6}+\purpleD{6}+80 
\end{align}$

**Yes**, this strategy works.

**The following strategies can be used to add $46+46$.**

- Add $6+6$ then add $80$.

- Add $46+4$ then add $42$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $24+31$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $23+30$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{24}+\purpleD{31}=&\blueE{23}+\blueE{1}+\purpleD{31}\\\\
=&\blueE{23}+32 \\\\
\neq &\blueE{23}+\redE{30} 
\end{align}$

**No**, this strategy does **not** work.

**The following strategy can be used to add $24+30$.**

- Add $24+30$ then add $1$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $59+37$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $59+40$ then subtract $3$.

$\blueE{59}+\purpleD{37}=\blueE{59}+\purpleD{40}-\purpleD{3}$

**Yes**, this strategy works.

**The following strategies can be used to add $59+37$.**

- Add $59+40$ then subtract $3$.

- Add $50+30$ then add $9$ then add $7$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $12+77$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $10+75$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{12}+\purpleD{77}&=\blueE{10}+\blueE{2}+\purpleD{77}\\\\
&= \blueE{10}+79\\\\
&\neq \blueE{10}+\redE{75}
\end{align}$

**No**, this strategy does **not** work.

Add $12+80$ then subtract $3$.

$\blueE{12}+\purpleD{77}=\blueE{12}+\purpleD{80}-\purpleD{3}$

**Yes**, this strategy works.

**The following strategy can be used to add $12+77$.**

- Add $12+80$ then subtract $3$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $23+63$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $20+68$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{23}+\purpleD{63}&=\blueE{20}+\blueE{3}+\purpleD{63}\\\\
&=\blueE{20}+66\\\\ 
&\neq\blueE{20}+\redE{68}
\end{align}$

**No**, this strategy does **not** work.

**The following strategy can be used to add $23+63$.**

- Add $20+60$ then add $3$ then add $3$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $62+21$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $60+20$ then add $21$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{62}+\purpleD{21}&=\blueE{60}+\blueE{2}+\purpleD{20}+\purpleD1\\\\
&= \blueE{60}+\purpleD{20}+\blueE{2}+\purpleD{1}\\\\
&= \blueE{60}+\purpleD{20}+3\\\\
&\neq \blueE{60}+\purpleD{20}+\redE{21}
\end{align}$

**No**, this strategy does **not** work.

**The following strategy can be used to add $62+21$.**

- Add $62+1$ then add $20$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $32+14$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $2+4$ then add $40$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{32}+\purpleD{14}&=\blueE{30}+\blueE{2}+\purpleD{10}+\purpleD4\\\\
&= \blueE{2}+\purpleD{4}+\blueE{30}+\purpleD{10}\\\\
&= \blueE{2}+\purpleD{4}+40
\end{align}$


**Yes**, this strategy works.

**The following strategy can be used to add $32+14$.**

- Add $2+4$ then add $40$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $15+56$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $56+4$ then add $11$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{15}+\purpleD{56}&=\purpleD{56}+\blueE{15}\\\\
&=\purpleD{56}+(\blueE{4}+\blueE{11})\\\\
&= (\purpleD{56}+\blueE{4})+\blueE{11}
\end{align}$

**Yes**, this strategy works.

Add $15+60$ then subtract $4$.

$\blueE{15}+\purpleD{56}=\blueE{15}+\purpleD{60}-\purpleD{4}$

**Yes**, this strategy works.

**The following strategies can be used to add $15+56$.**

- Add $56+4$ then add $11$.

- Add $15+60$ then subtract $4$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select any strategy that can be used to add $43+43$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Let's try each strategy one at a time to see if they work.

Add $40+48$.

$\begin{align}
\blueE{43}+\purpleD{43}&=\blueE{40}+\blueE{3}+\purpleD{43}\\\\
&=\blueE{40}+46\\\\ 
&\neq\blueE{40}+\redE{48}
\end{align}$

**No**, this strategy does **not** work.

**The following strategy can be used to add $43+43$.**

- Add $40+40$ then add $3$ then add $3$.
